title: 빗소리의 여백

prompt_fields.Style: Contemporary Korean warm neo-soul, intimate indie-pop.
prompt_fields.Feel: Rainy Seoul night reading; calm, amber, inward, slow drift.
prompt_fields.Vocal: Female alto A3-E5; warm legato, natural Korean, restrained, stable formants, clean phrase joins.
prompt_fields.Instrumentation: Rhodes lead, low round bass, muted guitar replies, brushes, rim clicks, faint rain texture; airy.
prompt_fields.Harmony: A/F#m; Verse Bm9-E13-Amaj9-C#7sus4; Pre Dmaj9-Dm9-C#m7-F#7alt; Chorus Bm9-E13-C#m7-F#7sus4; Bridge Dmaj9-E/D-C#m7-F#7alt.
prompt_fields.Form/Flow: 4-bar Rhodes intro; sparse verse; brushes enter in pre; choruses widen; voice/Rhodes bridge; gentle final peak; 4-bar outro.
prompt_fields.Production/Mix: Close dry lead, gentle dynamics, dark plate, wide keys/guitar, soft transients, warm tape.

exclusion_prompt: male lead, duet, rap, trap hi-hats, EDM drops, soprano belting, harsh distortion
